series_metadata.series_description: Information regarding the identification and program of inmates who receive special educational services. This includes Individualized Education Plan, and Multi-Factored Evaluation documentation as required by federal law.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Any/all Special Education records be maintained permanently. ; Paper: at institution where inmate is/was housed at least end of incarceration. be maintained transferred off-site storage facility. Records be maintained permanently in paper or electronic format. Paper records mayl be shredded if converted electronic format
